name: openpine-trading
description: OpenPine Trading plugin for Pine Script v6 strategy approvals.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Pine Script v6 strategies through OpenPine.
interface.longDescription: OpenPine Trading turns OpenPine's Pine Script v6 interpreter stack into a chat-operated trading workflow: compile strategies, run backtests, monitor order intents, and approve or resize trades before execution.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me operate OpenPine Trading: compile a Pine v6 strategy, run a backtest, monitor signals, and approve trades safely.
